description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is coarse and uneven, featuring a mix of muted gray and greenish tones with subtle hints of brown and pink, suggesting weathering and mineral diversity. The rock has a somewhat flattened profile on one side, while the opposite side rises to a more angular, jagged peak. Edges and corners are rounded in some areas and sharper in others, giving it a realistic, organic form. The texture appears hard and gritty, with no visible signs of artificial modification or markings. This rock would blend seamlessly into urban parks, landscaped areas, or as a natural barrier along sidewalks or roads.
description: A rugged, irregularly shaped gray-green rock with a coarse, weathered surface and a mix of rounded and angular features.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and relatively flat, with a rough, mottled surface and gentle undulations.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rock's tallest, most angular side, showing a steep, jagged peak and a more vertical profile.
description_view_2: The rock is seen from a flatter side, displaying a wide, uneven surface with subtle color variations and rough texture.
description_view_3: This angle reveals a pointed, triangular end with visible surface irregularities and a mix of gray and brown hues.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
